title: Compound V: Awakened
description: A Minecraft mod focused on The Boys, bringing powerful supers, experimental compounds, brutal abilities, and chaotic combat inspired by the dark superhero universe.
body:
# Compound V: Awakening

Forge 1.20.1 mod inspired by The Boys.

Awaken one of 10 superpower profiles using Compound V formulas, syringes, and a custom V Synthesis Bench. Each player can only have one power at a time.

## Features

- Compound V, Temp V, V1, Sage Grove V and Blood-V
- Vials for self-use
- Syringes for injecting other players
- Custom V Synthesis Bench
- Voughtite Ore for survival progression
- 10 power profiles
- Keybind abilities: Z, X and C
- Custom particles, effects, flight, lasers and PlayerAnimator animations
- Admin command: `/ca`

## Survival

Mine Voughtite Ore underground in the Overworld to get Voughtite Crystals.

Craft the V Synthesis Bench, then use it with:

- Steroids
- Neurotransmitters
- Voughtite Crystal
- Sterile Vial or Sterile Syringe
- A dye depending on the formula

Formula dyes:

- Compound V: Blue Dye
- Temp V: Lime Dye
- V1: Purple Dye
- Sage Grove V: Orange Dye
- Blood-V: Red Dye

## Powers

- Homelander: flight, Heat Vision, X-Ray Focus
- Queen Maeve: strength, defense breaking, combat reflexes
- A-Train: super speed and afterimages
- Starlight: light attacks and energy drain
- The Deep: aquatic abilities
- Black Noir: stealth, rush attacks and regeneration
- Stormfront: plasma, electricity and arc flight
- Soldier Boy: shield charge, radiation burst and power suppression
- Victoria Neuman: blood control
- Kimiko: leap attacks, claws and regeneration

## Commands

`/ca help`  
`/ca list`  
`/ca set <player> <power>`  
`/ca random <player>`  
`/ca remove <player>`  
`/ca state [player]`

## Requires

- Forge 1.20.1
- PlayerAnimator
